title: Cholamandalam Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Cholamandalam Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Cholamandalam Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
